case_title: FERGIE SABADO VS. JESSE LUMANOG ROCA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,638.59 FILED BY SABADO, FERGIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROCA, JESSE LUMANOG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABADO, FERGIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) SERVED MAY-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROCA, JESSE LUMANOG
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABADO, FERGIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCA, JESSE LUMANOG $5,568.56 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,568.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROCA, JESSE LUMANOG
